response: You have a big green plug from the US. You need to plug it into one of these outlets: a small round-pin socket, a large round-pin socket, or a large flat-pin socket. Which one should you choose?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a large green US plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the small round-pin socket, the large round-pin socket, or the large flat-pin socket. Which one?
